title: Successful Login After Brute Force
description: Detects a successful Windows logon (4624) that follows a burst of failed logons from the same source, indicating account compromise.
author: SOC Team

qradar.rule_name: SOC-002: Successful Login After Brute Force

aql: SELECT sourceip AS src_ip, username AS account, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS dc_host, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS logon_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentDevice=WindowsLog%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4624%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND username NOT ILIKE '%$' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
